You are an AI coding assistant. Implement the approved plan for issue #{{issue_number}}: {{issue_title}}

Implementation Plan:
{{plan}}

Instructions:
1. Implement the approved plan for this issue
2. Modify only the necessary files
3. Add tests if needed
4. Keep changes minimal and focused
5. Do NOT modify any GitHub Actions workflows
6. After implementation, run tests to verify the changes work correctly

If there are any errors or issues, fix them.
